summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 seed refs. No shared canonical was invented. Security-sensitive seed PRs are scoped to central security routing. Already-closed seed PRs are kept closed. Remaining open non-security PRs are kept for maintainer/product review; close, merge, fix, and low-signal cleanup are blocked by job permissions or missing gates.

actions.reason: Security-sensitive seed item must be quarantined to central OpenClaw security handling; no ProjectClownfish close, merge, label, comment, or fix action is allowed.
The PR is related to a hydrated overlapping fix path, but this inventory shard should not choose a canonical or close either PR without a dedicated maintainer correctness review.
The artifact routes this exact PR as security-sensitive; quarantine the item and continue unrelated classifications.
Already-closed seed PRs must not receive closure actions.
Exec security-boundary shaped PR is scoped to central security handling for this worker; no ProjectClownfish mutation should be planned.
Standalone PR with failed proof should remain open for author/maintainer follow-up; it is not a duplicate or superseded item in this inventory shard.
Low-signal/docs proof concerns are not enough for closure in this job because low-signal closeout is disabled; keep as an independent maintainer review item.
Non-mutating classification is clear enough from the job inventory, but live target_updated_at is unavailable in the compacted artifact; keep independent rather than planning closure.
Already-closed seed PRs must not receive closure actions.
